content:
本文提出为 NCCL 添加追踪功能的完整架构设计和实现建议，仅供参考，实际开发实现还是需要深入研究看全局。

一、需求分析与设计目标

1.1 核心需求

基于 NCCL 追踪系统应满足以下需求：

1，细粒度事件追踪

  • GPU 端：Kernel 内部操作（数据传输、计算、等待）
  • CPU 端：Proxy 线程操作（网络发送/接收、缓冲区管理）
  • 跨层协同：CPU-GPU 时间同步

2，低性能开销

  • 可选择性启用：编译时通过宏控制
  • 高效数据结构：环形缓冲区、无锁写入
  • 延迟转储：运行时收集，结束时统一导出

3，易于使用

  • 统一时间线：Chrome Trace Viewer 格式
  • 自动化工具链：一键式生成可视化结果
  • 灵活配置：环境变量控制追踪范围

4，可扩展性

  • 插件式事件定义：易于添加新事件类型
  • 多后端支持：JSON、二进制、流式输出

1.2 参考系统对比

特性NPKitMSCCL Profiler建议方案
GPU 事件✓ 细粒度 primitives✗ 无✓ 继承 NPKit 设计
CPU 事件✓ 网络操作✓ Proxy 状态机✓ 融合两者优点
时间同步✓ CPU-GPU 对齐✗ 仅 CPU✓ 多级时间同步
输出格式Google TraceGoogle Trace✓ 统一格式 + 扩展
部署方式补丁 + 重编译编译选项✓ 补丁 + CMake 选项

二、整体架构设计

2.1 系统架构图

┌─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┐
│                      NCCL Application                        │
└────────────────────┬────────────────────────────────────────┘
                     │
        ┌────────────┴────────────┐
        │                         │
   ┌────▼─────┐            ┌─────▼────┐
   │   CPU    │            │   GPU    │
   │  Trace   │            │  Trace   │
   └────┬─────┘            └─────┬────┘
        │                         │
        │  ┌──────────────────┐   │
        └──►  Trace Manager  ◄───┘
           └────────┬─────────┘
                    │
           ┌────────▼─────────┐
           │  Event Buffers   │
           │  ┌────┬────┬───┐ │
           │  │GPU │CPU │...│ │
           │  └────┴────┴───┘ │
           └────────┬─────────┘
                    │
           ┌────────▼─────────┐
           │  Dump & Export   │
           └────────┬─────────┘
                    │
        ┌───────────┴──────────┐
        │                      │
   ┌────▼─────┐         ┌─────▼────────┐
   │  Binary  │         │ Trace JSON   │
   │  Events  │──Parser─► (Chrome)     │
   └──────────┘         └──────────────┘

2.2 核心组件

2.2.1 事件定义层（Event Definition）

文件: src/include/nccl_trace/trace_event.h

#ifndef NCCL_TRACE_EVENT_H_
#define NCCL_TRACE_EVENT_H_

// Event IDs - 0x0000-0x00FF: Control events
#define NCCL_TRACE_EVENT_INVALID                    0x00
#define NCCL_TRACE_EVENT_TIME_SYNC_CPU              0x01
#define NCCL_TRACE_EVENT_TIME_SYNC_GPU              0x02

// 0x0100-0x01FF: GPU Collective Operations
#define NCCL_TRACE_EVENT_ALLREDUCE_ENTRY            0x0100
#define NCCL_TRACE_EVENT_ALLREDUCE_EXIT             0x0101
#define NCCL_TRACE_EVENT_BROADCAST_ENTRY            0x0102
#define NCCL_TRACE_EVENT_BROADCAST_EXIT             0x0103
#define NCCL_TRACE_EVENT_REDUCE_ENTRY               0x0104
#define NCCL_TRACE_EVENT_REDUCE_EXIT                0x0105
#define NCCL_TRACE_EVENT_ALLGATHER_ENTRY            0x0106
#define NCCL_TRACE_EVENT_ALLGATHER_EXIT             0x0107

// 0x0200-0x02FF: GPU Primitives (Ring/Tree/CollNet)
#define NCCL_TRACE_EVENT_RING_SEND_ENTRY            0x0200
#define NCCL_TRACE_EVENT_RING_SEND_EXIT             0x0201
#define NCCL_TRACE_EVENT_RING_RECV_ENTRY            0x0202
#define NCCL_TRACE_EVENT_RING_RECV_EXIT             0x0203
#define NCCL_TRACE_EVENT_TREE_UP_ENTRY              0x0204
#define NCCL_TRACE_EVENT_TREE_UP_EXIT               0x0205
#define NCCL_TRACE_EVENT_TREE_DOWN_ENTRY            0x0206
#define NCCL_TRACE_EVENT_TREE_DOWN_EXIT             0x0207

// 0x0300-0x03FF: GPU Data Transfer
#define NCCL_TRACE_EVENT_LL_SEND_ENTRY              0x0300
#define NCCL_TRACE_EVENT_LL_SEND_EXIT               0x0301
#define NCCL_TRACE_EVENT_LL128_SEND_ENTRY           0x0302
#define NCCL_TRACE_EVENT_LL128_SEND_EXIT            0x0303
#define NCCL_TRACE_EVENT_SIMPLE_SEND_ENTRY          0x0304
#define NCCL_TRACE_EVENT_SIMPLE_SEND_EXIT           0x0305

// 0x0400-0x04FF: GPU Synchronization
#define NCCL_TRACE_EVENT_WAIT_SEND_ENTRY            0x0400
#define NCCL_TRACE_EVENT_WAIT_SEND_EXIT             0x0401
#define NCCL_TRACE_EVENT_WAIT_RECV_ENTRY            0x0402
#define NCCL_TRACE_EVENT_WAIT_RECV_EXIT             0x0403
#define NCCL_TRACE_EVENT_POST_SEND_ENTRY            0x0404
#define NCCL_TRACE_EVENT_POST_SEND_EXIT             0x0405

// 0x0500-0x05FF: CPU Proxy Operations
#define NCCL_TRACE_EVENT_PROXY_SEND_ENTRY           0x0500
#define NCCL_TRACE_EVENT_PROXY_SEND_EXIT            0x0501
#define NCCL_TRACE_EVENT_PROXY_RECV_ENTRY           0x0502
#define NCCL_TRACE_EVENT_PROXY_RECV_EXIT            0x0503
#define NCCL_TRACE_EVENT_PROXY_POLL_ENTRY           0x0504
#define NCCL_TRACE_EVENT_PROXY_POLL_EXIT            0x0505

// 0x0600-0x06FF: CPU Network Operations
#define NCCL_TRACE_EVENT_NET_ISEND_ENTRY            0x0600
#define NCCL_TRACE_EVENT_NET_ISEND_EXIT             0x0601
#define NCCL_TRACE_EVENT_NET_IRECV_ENTRY            0x0602
#define NCCL_TRACE_EVENT_NET_IRECV_EXIT             0x0603
#define NCCL_TRACE_EVENT_NET_TEST_ENTRY             0x0604
#define NCCL_TRACE_EVENT_NET_TEST_EXIT              0x0605
#define NCCL_TRACE_EVENT_NET_FLUSH_ENTRY            0x0606
#define NCCL_TRACE_EVENT_NET_FLUSH_EXIT             0x0607

// 0x0700-0x07FF: CPU Transport Operations
#define NCCL_TRACE_EVENT_P2P_SEND_ENTRY             0x0700
#define NCCL_TRACE_EVENT_P2P_SEND_EXIT              0x0701
#define NCCL_TRACE_EVENT_P2P_RECV_ENTRY             0x0702
#define NCCL_TRACE_EVENT_P2P_RECV_EXIT              0x0703
#define NCCL_TRACE_EVENT_SHM_SEND_ENTRY             0x0704
#define NCCL_TRACE_EVENT_SHM_SEND_EXIT              0x0705

#endif

2.2.2 数据结构层（Data Structure）

文件: src/include/nccl_trace/trace_struct.h

#ifndef NCCL_TRACE_STRUCT_H_
#define NCCL_TRACE_STRUCT_H_

#include <cstdint>

#pragma pack(push, 1)

// 事件结构 (16 bytes)
union NcclTraceEvent {
  uint64_t bits[2];
  struct {
    uint64_t type : 16;        // 事件类型 ID
    uint64_t size : 32;        // 数据大小 (bytes)
    uint64_t rsvd : 16;        // 保留字段 (延迟/slot/等)
    uint64_t timestamp;        // 时间戳
  } fields;
};

// 事件收集上下文
struct NcclTraceCollectContext {
  NcclTraceEvent* event_buffer;
  uint64_t event_buffer_head;
  uint64_t event_buffer_capacity;
};

// 时钟同步信息
struct NcclTraceClockSync {
  uint64_t cpu_clock_init;     // CPU 初始时间
  uint64_t gpu_clock_init;     // GPU 初始时间
  uint64_t cpu_period_num;     // CPU 时钟周期分子
  uint64_t cpu_period_den;     // CPU 时钟周期分母
  uint64_t gpu_clock_rate_khz; // GPU 时钟频率 (kHz)
};

#pragma pack(pop)

// 编译时配置宏
#if defined(ENABLE_NCCL_TRACE)

#define NCCL_TRACE_GPU_COMM_DECL_FIELDS \
  NcclTraceCollectContext* traceEventCollectContexts; \
  uint64_t* traceCpuTimestamp;

#define NCCL_TRACE_CPU_PROXY_DECL_FIELDS \
  int traceSizesFifo[NCCL_STEPS]; \
  uint64_t traceSlotToReqId[NCCL_STEPS];

#else

#define NCCL_TRACE_GPU_COMM_DECL_FIELDS
#define NCCL_TRACE_CPU_PROXY_DECL_FIELDS

#endif

#endif

2.2.3 追踪管理器（Trace Manager）

文件: src/include/nccl_trace/trace.h

#ifndef NCCL_TRACE_H_
#define NCCL_TRACE_H_

#include <string>
#include <thread>
#include <atomic>
#include "nccl_trace/trace_event.h"
#include "nccl_trace/trace_struct.h"

class NcclTrace {
 public:
  // 缓冲区配置
  static const uint64_t kNumGpuEventBuffers = 512;     // 每 GPU 512 个缓冲区
  static const uint64_t kMaxGpuEventsPerBuffer = 65536; // 64K events/buffer
  static const uint64_t kNumCpuEventBuffers = 32;      // 每进程 32 个 CPU 缓冲区
  static const uint64_t kMaxCpuEventsPerBuffer = 2097152; // 2M events/buffer

  // 初始化与销毁
  static ncclResult_t Init(int rank);
  static ncclResult_t Shutdown();

  // 数据导出
  static ncclResult_t Dump(const std::string& dump_dir);

  // 获取上下文
  static NcclTraceCollectContext* GetGpuEventCollectContexts();
  static uint64_t* GetCpuTimestamp();

  // GPU 事件收集 (设备端调用)
  static inline __device__ void CollectGpuEvent(
      uint16_t type, uint32_t size, uint16_t rsvd, 
      uint64_t timestamp, NcclTraceCollectContext* ctx) {
    uint64_t head = ctx->event_buffer_head;
    if (head < ctx->event_buffer_capacity) {
      NcclTraceEvent& event = ctx->event_buffer[head];
      event.fields.type = type;
      event.fields.size = size;
      event.fields.rsvd = rsvd;
      event.fields.timestamp = timestamp;
      ctx->event_buffer_head++;
    }
  }

  // CPU 事件收集 (主机端调用)
  static void CollectCpuEvent(
      uint16_t type, uint32_t size, uint16_t rsvd, 
      uint64_t timestamp, int context_id);

  // 统计信息
  struct Stats {
    uint64_t total_gpu_events;
    uint64_t total_cpu_events;
    uint64_t dropped_gpu_events;
    uint64_t dropped_cpu_events;
    double collection_overhead_ms;
  };
  static Stats GetStats();

 private:
  static void CpuTimestampUpdateThread();

  // 内部状态
  static int rank_;
  static NcclTraceEvent** gpu_event_buffers_;
  static NcclTraceEvent** cpu_event_buffers_;
  static NcclTraceCollectContext* gpu_collect_contexts_;
  static NcclTraceCollectContext* cpu_collect_contexts_;
  static uint64_t* cpu_timestamp_;
  static NcclTraceClockSync clock_sync_;

  static std::thread* cpu_timestamp_update_thread_;
  static std::atomic<bool> cpu_timestamp_update_thread_should_stop_;
  static Stats stats_;
};

// ================ 宏定义 API ================

#if defined(ENABLE_NCCL_TRACE)

// GPU 时间同步
#define NCCL_TRACE_GPU_SYNC_TIME(__bid__, __tid__) \
  do { \
    if ((__tid__) == 0) { \
      int __ctx_id__ = (__bid__); \
      NcclTrace::CollectGpuEvent( \
          NCCL_TRACE_EVENT_TIME_SYNC_CPU, 0, 0, \
          *(ncclShmem.comm.traceCpuTimestamp), \
          ncclShmem.comm.traceEventCollectContexts + __ctx_id__); \
      NcclTrace::CollectGpuEvent( \
          NCCL_TRACE_EVENT_TIME_SYNC_GPU, 0, 0, \
          clock64(), \
          ncclShmem.comm.traceEventCollectContexts + __ctx_id__); \
    } \
  } while(0)

// GPU 事件记录
#define NCCL_TRACE_GPU_EVENT(__type__, __size__, __rsvd__, __tid__, __ctx_id__) \
  do { \
    if ((__tid__) == 0) { \
      NcclTrace::CollectGpuEvent( \
          __type__, __size__, __rsvd__, clock64(), \
          ncclShmem.comm.traceEventCollectContexts + (__ctx_id__)); \
    } \
  } while(0)

// CPU 事件记录
#define NCCL_TRACE_CPU_EVENT(__type__, __size__, __rsvd__, __ctx_id__) \
  NcclTrace::CollectCpuEvent( \
      __type__, __size__, __rsvd__, \
      *(volatile uint64_t*)NcclTrace::GetCpuTimestamp(), __ctx_id__)

// 初始化
#define NCCL_TRACE_INIT(__comm__) \
  do { \
    NCCLCHECK(NcclTrace::Init((__comm__)->rank)); \
    (__comm__)->hostDevComm.traceEventCollectContexts = \
        NcclTrace::GetGpuEventCollectContexts(); \
    (__comm__)->hostDevComm.traceCpuTimestamp = \
        NcclTrace::GetCpuTimestamp(); \
  } while(0)

// 销毁与导出
#define NCCL_TRACE_DUMP_AND_SHUTDOWN() \
  do { \
    const char* dump_dir = getenv("NCCL_TRACE_DUMP_DIR"); \
    if (dump_dir == nullptr) dump_dir = "/tmp/nccl_trace"; \
    NCCLCHECK(NcclTrace::Dump(dump_dir)); \
    NCCLCHECK(NcclTrace::Shutdown()); \
  } while(0)

#else

// 禁用追踪时的空宏
#define NCCL_TRACE_GPU_SYNC_TIME(__bid__, __tid__)
#define NCCL_TRACE_GPU_EVENT(__type__, __size__, __rsvd__, __tid__, __ctx_id__)
#define NCCL_TRACE_CPU_EVENT(__type__, __size__, __rsvd__, __ctx_id__)
#define NCCL_TRACE_INIT(__comm__)
#define NCCL_TRACE_DUMP_AND_SHUTDOWN()

#endif

#endif

2.2.4 追踪实现层（Trace Implementation）

文件: src/misc/trace.cc

#include "nccl_trace/trace.h"
#include "alloc.h"
#include "debug.h"
#include <chrono>
#include <fstream>
#include <sys/stat.h>
#include <sys/types.h>

// 静态成员初始化
int NcclTrace::rank_ = 0;
NcclTraceEvent** NcclTrace::gpu_event_buffers_ = nullptr;
NcclTraceEvent** NcclTrace::cpu_event_buffers_ = nullptr;
NcclTraceCollectContext* NcclTrace::gpu_collect_contexts_ = nullptr;
NcclTraceCollectContext* NcclTrace::cpu_collect_contexts_ = nullptr;
uint64_t* NcclTrace::cpu_timestamp_ = nullptr;
NcclTraceClockSync NcclTrace::clock_sync_ = {0};
std::thread* NcclTrace::cpu_timestamp_update_thread_ = nullptr;
std::atomic<bool> NcclTrace::cpu_timestamp_update_thread_should_stop_(false);
NcclTrace::Stats NcclTrace::stats_ = {0};

void NcclTrace::CpuTimestampUpdateThread() {
  uint64_t init_system = std::chrono::system_clock::now().time_since_epoch().count();
  uint64_t init_steady = std::chrono::steady_clock::now().time_since_epoch().count();

  volatile uint64_t* volatile_ts = cpu_timestamp_;
  while (!cpu_timestamp_update_thread_should_stop_.load(std::memory_order_relaxed)) {
    uint64_t curr_steady = std::chrono::steady_clock::now().time_since_epoch().count();
    *volatile_ts = init_system + (curr_steady - init_steady);
    std::this_thread::sleep_for(std::chrono::microseconds(100)); // 减少 CPU 占用
  }
}

ncclResult_t NcclTrace::Init(int rank) {
  auto start = std::chrono::high_resolution_clock::now();

  rank_ = rank;
  NcclTraceCollectContext ctx;
  ctx.event_buffer_head = 0;

  // 初始化 GPU 事件缓冲区
  NCCLCHECK(ncclCalloc(&gpu_event_buffers_, kNumGpuEventBuffers));
  NCCLCHECK(ncclCudaCalloc(&gpu_collect_contexts_, kNumGpuEventBuffers));

  for (uint64_t i = 0; i < kNumGpuEventBuffers; i++) {
    NCCLCHECK(ncclCudaCalloc(gpu_event_buffers_ + i, kMaxGpuEventsPerBuffer));
    ctx.event_buffer = gpu_event_buffers_[i];
    ctx.event_buffer_capacity = kMaxGpuEventsPerBuffer;
    NCCLCHECK(ncclCudaMemcpy(gpu_collect_contexts_ + i, &ctx, 1));
  }

  // 初始化 CPU 事件缓冲区
  NCCLCHECK(ncclCalloc(&cpu_event_buffers_, kNumCpuEventBuffers));
  NCCLCHECK(ncclCalloc(&cpu_collect_contexts_, kNumCpuEventBuffers));

  for (uint64_t i = 0; i < kNumCpuEventBuffers; i++) {
    NCCLCHECK(ncclCalloc(cpu_event_buffers_ + i, kMaxCpuEventsPerBuffer));
    ctx.event_buffer = cpu_event_buffers_[i];
    ctx.event_buffer_capacity = kMaxCpuEventsPerBuffer;
    cpu_collect_contexts_[i] = ctx;
  }

  // 初始化时钟同步
  clock_sync_.cpu_clock_init = std::chrono::system_clock::now().time_since_epoch().count();
  clock_sync_.cpu_period_num = std::chrono::steady_clock::duration::period::num;
  clock_sync_.cpu_period_den = std::chrono::steady_clock::duration::period::den;

  int dev;
  cudaDeviceProp dev_prop;
  CUDACHECK(cudaGetDevice(&dev));
  CUDACHECK(cudaGetDeviceProperties(&dev_prop, dev));
  clock_sync_.gpu_clock_rate_khz = dev_prop.clockRate;

  // 启动 CPU 时间戳更新线程
  NCCLCHECK(ncclCudaHostCalloc(&cpu_timestamp_, 1));
  *cpu_timestamp_ = clock_sync_.cpu_clock_init;

  cpu_timestamp_update_thread_should_stop_.store(false, std::memory_order_relaxed);
  cpu_timestamp_update_thread_ = new std::thread(CpuTimestampUpdateThread);

  auto end = std::chrono::high_resolution_clock::now();
  stats_.collection_overhead_ms = 
      std::chrono::duration<double, std::milli>(end - start).count();

  INFO(NCCL_INIT, "NCCL Trace initialized for rank %d (overhead: %.2f ms)", 
       rank, stats_.collection_overhead_ms);

  return ncclSuccess;
}

ncclResult_t NcclTrace::Dump(const std::string& dump_dir) {
  // 创建输出目录
  mkdir(dump_dir.c_str(), 0755);

  std::string dump_file;

  // 导出 CPU 事件
  for (uint64_t i = 0; i < kNumCpuEventBuffers; i++) {
    dump_file = dump_dir + "/cpu_events_rank_" + std::to_string(rank_) + 
                "_channel_" + std::to_string(i);
    std::ofstream cpu_trace(dump_file, std::ios::binary);
    uint64_t count = cpu_collect_contexts_[i].event_buffer_head;
    cpu_trace.write(reinterpret_cast<char*>(cpu_event_buffers_[i]),
                    count * sizeof(NcclTraceEvent));
    cpu_trace.close();
    stats_.total_cpu_events += count;
  }

  // 导出 CPU 时钟信息
  dump_file = dump_dir + "/cpu_clock_period_num_rank_" + std::to_string(rank_);
  std::ofstream(dump_file) << clock_sync_.cpu_period_num;

  dump_file = dump_dir + "/cpu_clock_period_den_rank_" + std::to_string(rank_);
  std::ofstream(dump_file) << clock_sync_.cpu_period_den;

  // 导出 GPU 事件 (需先拷贝到主机)
  NcclTraceCollectContext host_ctx;
  for (uint64_t i = 0; i < kNumGpuEventBuffers; i++) {
    dump_file = dump_dir + "/gpu_events_rank_" + std::to_string(rank_) + 
                "_buf_" + std::to_string(i);

    NCCLCHECK(ncclCudaMemcpy(&host_ctx, gpu_collect_contexts_ + i, 1));
    NCCLCHECK(ncclCudaMemcpy(cpu_event_buffers_[0], gpu_event_buffers_[i], 
                             kMaxGpuEventsPerBuffer));

    std::ofstream gpu_trace(dump_file, std::ios::binary);
    gpu_trace.write(reinterpret_cast<char*>(cpu_event_buffers_[0]),
                    host_ctx.event_buffer_head * sizeof(NcclTraceEvent));
    gpu_trace.close();
    stats_.total_gpu_events += host_ctx.event_buffer_head;
  }

  // 导出 GPU 时钟信息
  dump_file = dump_dir + "/gpu_clock_rate_rank_" + std::to_string(rank_);
  std::ofstream(dump_file) << clock_sync_.gpu_clock_rate_khz;

  INFO(NCCL_INIT, "NCCL Trace dumped for rank %d: %lu GPU events, %lu CPU events",
       rank_, stats_.total_gpu_events, stats_.total_cpu_events);

  return ncclSuccess;
}

ncclResult_t NcclTrace::Shutdown() {
  // 停止时间戳更新线程
  cpu_timestamp_update_thread_should_stop_.store(true, std::memory_order_relaxed);
  cpu_timestamp_update_thread_->join();
  delete cpu_timestamp_update_thread_;

  // 释放 CPU 资源
  for (uint64_t i = 0; i < kNumCpuEventBuffers; i++) {
    free(cpu_event_buffers_[i]);
  }
  free(cpu_event_buffers_);
  free(cpu_collect_contexts_);

  // 释放 GPU 资源
  for (uint64_t i = 0; i < kNumGpuEventBuffers; i++) {
    CUDACHECK(cudaFree(gpu_event_buffers_[i]));
  }
  free(gpu_event_buffers_);
  CUDACHECK(cudaFree(gpu_collect_contexts_));
  NCCLCHECK(ncclCudaHostFree(cpu_timestamp_));

  return ncclSuccess;
}

NcclTraceCollectContext* NcclTrace::GetGpuEventCollectContexts() {
  return gpu_collect_contexts_;
}

uint64_t* NcclTrace::GetCpuTimestamp() {
  return cpu_timestamp_;
}

void NcclTrace::CollectCpuEvent(uint16_t type, uint32_t size, uint16_t rsvd,
                                 uint64_t timestamp, int context_id) {
  if (context_id >= (int)kNumCpuEventBuffers) return;

  uint64_t head = cpu_collect_contexts_[context_id].event_buffer_head;
  if (head < cpu_collect_contexts_[context_id].event_buffer_capacity) {
    NcclTraceEvent& event = cpu_collect_contexts_[context_id].event_buffer[head];
    event.fields.type = type;
    event.fields.size = size;
    event.fields.rsvd = rsvd;
    event.fields.timestamp = timestamp;
    cpu_collect_contexts_[context_id].event_buffer_head++;
  } else {
    stats_.dropped_cpu_events++;
  }
}

NcclTrace::Stats NcclTrace::GetStats() {
  return stats_;
}

三、插桩点设计

3.1 GPU 端插桩

3.1.1 Collective Operations

文件: src/collectives/device/all_reduce.h

template<typename T, typename RedOp, typename Proto>
__device__ void ncclAllReduceKernel(...) {
  int tid = threadIdx.x;
  int bid = blockIdx.x;

  // 时间同步
  NCCL_TRACE_GPU_SYNC_TIME(bid, tid);

  // AllReduce 入口
  NCCL_TRACE_GPU_EVENT(NCCL_TRACE_EVENT_ALLREDUCE_ENTRY, 
                       args->count * sizeof(T), 0, tid, bid);

  // ... 原有逻辑 ...

  // AllReduce 出口
  NCCL_TRACE_GPU_EVENT(NCCL_TRACE_EVENT_ALLREDUCE_EXIT, 
                       args->count * sizeof(T), 0, tid, bid);
}

3.1.2 Primitives (Ring/Tree)

文件: src/collectives/device/primitives.h

template<typename T, typename RedOp, int NRECV, int NSEND>
class Primitives {
 private:
  int ctx_id_;  // 追踪上下文 ID

 public:
  __device__ void send(const T* src, int nelem) {
    NCCL_TRACE_GPU_EVENT(NCCL_TRACE_EVENT_RING_SEND_ENTRY, 
                         nelem * sizeof(T), 0, threadIdx.x, ctx_id_);
    // ... 发送逻辑 ...
    NCCL_TRACE_GPU_EVENT(NCCL_TRACE_EVENT_RING_SEND_EXIT, 
                         nelem * sizeof(T), wait_cycles, threadIdx.x, ctx_id_);
  }

  __device__ void recv(T* dst, int nelem) {
    NCCL_TRACE_GPU_EVENT(NCCL_TRACE_EVENT_RING_RECV_ENTRY, 
                         nelem * sizeof(T), 0, threadIdx.x, ctx_id_);
    // ... 接收逻辑 ...
    NCCL_TRACE_GPU_EVENT(NCCL_TRACE_EVENT_RING_RECV_EXIT, 
                         nelem * sizeof(T), wait_cycles, threadIdx.x, ctx_id_);
  }
};

3.2 CPU 端插桩

3.2.1 Proxy 网络操作

文件: src/transport/net.cc

static ncclResult_t sendProxyProgress(...) {
  int channel_id = args->subs[0].channelId;

  // 发送入口
  NCCL_TRACE_CPU_EVENT(NCCL_TRACE_EVENT_PROXY_SEND_ENTRY, 
                       size, slot, channel_id);

  NCCLCHECK(ncclNetIsend(...));

  // 发送出口
  NCCL_TRACE_CPU_EVENT(NCCL_TRACE_EVENT_PROXY_SEND_EXIT, 
                       size, slot, channel_id);

  return ncclSuccess;
}

3.2.2 网络驱动层

文件: src/transport/net.cc

ncclResult_t ncclNetIsend(...) {
  int ctx_id = ...; // 从 netComm 获取

  NCCL_TRACE_CPU_EVENT(NCCL_TRACE_EVENT_NET_ISEND_ENTRY, 
                       size, 0, ctx_id);

  // 调用底层网络库 (IB/Socket/...)

  NCCL_TRACE_CPU_EVENT(NCCL_TRACE_EVENT_NET_ISEND_EXIT, 
                       size, 0, ctx_id);

  return ncclSuccess;
}

四、后处理工具链

4.1 Trace 转换器

文件: tools/nccl_trace_generator.py

#!/usr/bin/env python3
import argparse
import json
import os
import struct

class NcclTraceGenerator:
    def __init__(self, event_def_path):
        self.event_def = self.parse_event_definitions(event_def_path)

    def parse_event_definitions(self, path):
        """解析 trace_event.h 获取事件定义"""
        event_map = {'id_to_name': {}, 'name_to_id': {}}
        with open(path, 'r') as f:
            for line in f:
                if line.startswith('#define NCCL_TRACE_EVENT_'):
                    parts = line.split()
                    if len(parts) == 3:
                        name = parts[1]
                        event_id = int(parts[2], 0)
                        event_map['name_to_id'][name] = event_id
                        event_map['id_to_name'][event_id] = name
        return event_map

    def parse_binary_events(self, file_path):
        """解析二进制事件文件"""
        events = []
        with open(file_path, 'rb') as f:
            while True:
                data = f.read(16)  # NcclTraceEvent 大小
                if len(data) < 16:
                    break

                # 解包事件 (little-endian)
                type_val = struct.unpack('<H', data[0:2])[0]
                size_val = struct.unpack('<I', data[2:6])[0]
                rsvd_val = struct.unpack('<H', data[6:8])[0]
                timestamp = struct.unpack('<Q', data[8:16])[0]

                event_name = self.event_def['id_to_name'].get(type_val, 'UNKNOWN')
                events.append({
                    'type': type_val,
                    'name': event_name,
                    'size': size_val,
                    'rsvd': rsvd_val,
                    'timestamp': timestamp
                })
        return events

    def generate_chrome_trace(self, dump_dir, output_path):
        """生成 Chrome Trace Viewer 格式"""
        trace_events = []

        # 扫描所有 rank 的事件文件
        files = os.listdir(dump_dir)

        # 解析 GPU 事件
        gpu_files = [f for f in files if f.startswith('gpu_events_')]
        for gpu_file in gpu_files:
            parts = gpu_file.split('_')
            rank = int(parts[3])
            buf_idx = int(parts[5])

            events = self.parse_binary_events(os.path.join(dump_dir, gpu_file))

            # 时间同步
            cpu_base_time = None
            gpu_base_time = None

            for event in events:
                if event['name'] == 'NCCL_TRACE_EVENT_TIME_SYNC_CPU':
                    cpu_base_time = event['timestamp']
                elif event['name'] == 'NCCL_TRACE_EVENT_TIME_SYNC_GPU':
                    gpu_base_time = event['timestamp']
                elif event['name'].endswith('_ENTRY'):
                    # 开始事件
                    trace_events.append({
                        'name': event['name'].replace('_ENTRY', ''),
                        'cat': 'GPU',
                        'ph': 'B',  # Begin
                        'ts': self.gpu_to_cpu_time(event['timestamp'], 
                                                     cpu_base_time, gpu_base_time),
                        'pid': rank,
                        'tid': buf_idx + 1,
                        'args': {
                            'size': event['size'],
                            'rsvd': event['rsvd']
                        }
                    })
                elif event['name'].endswith('_EXIT'):
                    # 结束事件
                    trace_events.append({
                        'name': event['name'].replace('_EXIT', ''),
                        'cat': 'GPU',
                        'ph': 'E',  # End
                        'ts': self.gpu_to_cpu_time(event['timestamp'], 
                                                     cpu_base_time, gpu_base_time),
                        'pid': rank,
                        'tid': buf_idx + 1,
                        'args': {
                            'size': event['size'],
                            'wait_cycles': event['rsvd']
                        }
                    })

        # 解析 CPU 事件 (类似逻辑)
        cpu_files = [f for f in files if f.startswith('cpu_events_')]
        # ... (省略，逻辑与 GPU 类似)

        # 排序并输出
        trace_events.sort(key=lambda x: x['ts'])

        trace_json = {
            'traceEvents': trace_events,
            'displayTimeUnit': 'ns',
            'otherData': {
                'version': 'NCCL Trace v1.0'
            }
        }

        with open(output_path, 'w') as f:
            json.dump(trace_json, f, indent=2)

    def gpu_to_cpu_time(self, gpu_ts, cpu_base, gpu_base):
        """GPU 时间戳转换为 CPU 时间"""
        # 根据时钟频率转换
        # ... 实现时钟同步逻辑 ...
        return cpu_base + (gpu_ts - gpu_base) * scaling_factor

if __name__ == '__main__':
    parser = argparse.ArgumentParser(description='NCCL Trace Generator')
    parser.add_argument('--dump_dir', required=True, 
                        help='Directory containing binary trace dumps')
    parser.add_argument('--output', required=True, 
                        help='Output JSON file path')
    parser.add_argument('--event_def', default='../src/include/nccl_trace/trace_event.h',
                        help='Path to trace_event.h')
    args = parser.parse_args()

    generator = NcclTraceGenerator(args.event_def)
    generator.generate_chrome_trace(args.dump_dir, args.output)
    print(f"Trace generated: {args.output}")

4.2 一键式运行脚本

文件: tools/run_with_trace.sh

#!/bin/bash

# NCCL Trace 一键式运行脚本

set -e

# 配置参数
NCCL_TRACE_DUMP_DIR=${NCCL_TRACE_DUMP_DIR:-"/tmp/nccl_trace_$(date +%Y%m%d_%H%M%S)"}
NCCL_TRACE_EVENTS=${NCCL_TRACE_EVENTS:-"ALLREDUCE,RING_SEND,RING_RECV,PROXY_SEND,PROXY_RECV"}
NCCL_TRACE_OUTPUT=${NCCL_TRACE_OUTPUT:-"./nccl_trace.json"}

echo "========== NCCL Trace Runner =========="
echo "Dump Directory: $NCCL_TRACE_DUMP_DIR"
echo "Enabled Events: $NCCL_TRACE_EVENTS"
echo "Output File: $NCCL_TRACE_OUTPUT"
echo "========================================"

# 创建输出目录
mkdir -p "$NCCL_TRACE_DUMP_DIR"

# 设置环境变量
export NCCL_TRACE_DUMP_DIR
export NCCL_TRACE_EVENTS

# 运行用户程序
echo "Running application with NCCL tracing enabled..."
"$@"

# 生成追踪 JSON
echo "Generating Chrome Trace JSON..."
python3 "$(dirname "$0")/nccl_trace_generator.py" \
    --dump_dir "$NCCL_TRACE_DUMP_DIR" \
    --output "$NCCL_TRACE_OUTPUT"

echo "Trace generated successfully: $NCCL_TRACE_OUTPUT"
echo "View with: chrome://tracing or https://ui.perfetto.dev"

五、编译集成方案

5.1 Makefile 修改

文件: src/Makefile

# 追踪功能编译选项
TRACE_FLAGS ?=
ifneq ($(TRACE_FLAGS),)
  NVCUFLAGS += $(TRACE_FLAGS)
  CXXFLAGS += $(TRACE_FLAGS)
endif

# 追踪源文件
TRACE_SRCS := $(wildcard misc/trace.cc)
TRACE_OBJS := $(TRACE_SRCS:%.cc=$(OBJDIR)/%.o)

# 添加到编译目标
OBJS += $(TRACE_OBJS)

# 示例编译命令
# make TRACE_FLAGS="-DENABLE_NCCL_TRACE -DENABLE_NCCL_TRACE_EVENT_ALLREDUCE_ENTRY ..."

5.2 CMake 支持

文件: CMakeLists.txt

# NCCL Trace 选项
option(ENABLE_NCCL_TRACE "Enable NCCL tracing" OFF)

if(ENABLE_NCCL_TRACE)
  # 追踪事件定义
  set(NCCL_TRACE_EVENTS "" CACHE STRING "Comma-separated trace event names")

  # 解析事件并生成编译宏
  if(NCCL_TRACE_EVENTS)
    string(REPLACE "," ";" EVENT_LIST ${NCCL_TRACE_EVENTS})
    foreach(EVENT ${EVENT_LIST})
      add_definitions(-DENABLE_NCCL_TRACE_EVENT_${EVENT}_ENTRY)
      add_definitions(-DENABLE_NCCL_TRACE_EVENT_${EVENT}_EXIT)
    endforeach()
  endif()

  add_definitions(-DENABLE_NCCL_TRACE)
  add_definitions(-DENABLE_NCCL_TRACE_EVENT_TIME_SYNC_CPU)
  add_definitions(-DENABLE_NCCL_TRACE_EVENT_TIME_SYNC_GPU)

  message(STATUS "NCCL Trace enabled with events: ${NCCL_TRACE_EVENTS}")
endif()

# 示例用法
# cmake -DENABLE_NCCL_TRACE=ON -DNCCL_TRACE_EVENTS="ALLREDUCE,BROADCAST" ..

六、性能优化建议

6.1 零拷贝优化

使用 CUDA Unified Memory 或 Zero-Copy 内存减少 GPU->CPU 数据传输开销：

// 使用 Pinned Memory
NCCLCHECK(ncclCudaHostCalloc(&gpu_event_buffers_host_view_, kNumGpuEventBuffers));

// 映射到设备
cudaHostGetDevicePointer(&gpu_event_buffers_device_, 
                         gpu_event_buffers_host_view_, 0);

6.2 批量写入

减少原子操作频率：

__device__ void CollectGpuEventBatch(NcclTraceEvent* events, int count, 
                                      NcclTraceCollectContext* ctx) {
  uint64_t head = atomicAdd(&ctx->event_buffer_head, count);
  if (head + count <= ctx->event_buffer_capacity) {
    for (int i = 0; i < count; i++) {
      ctx->event_buffer[head + i] = events[i];
    }
  }
}

6.3 按需采样

降低高频事件的记录频率：

#define NCCL_TRACE_SAMPLING_RATE 100  // 每 100 次记录一次

__device__ void CollectGpuEventSampled(...) {
  static __shared__ int sample_counter;
  if (threadIdx.x == 0) {
    if (atomicAdd(&sample_counter, 1) % NCCL_TRACE_SAMPLING_RATE == 0) {
      CollectGpuEvent(...);
    }
  }
}

七、使用示例

7.1 完整编译流程

# 1. 克隆 NCCL
git clone https://github.com/NVIDIA/nccl.git
cd nccl

# 2. 应用追踪补丁
git apply /path/to/nccl_trace.patch

# 3. 编译启用追踪
make -j TRACE_FLAGS="-DENABLE_NCCL_TRACE \
  -DENABLE_NCCL_TRACE_EVENT_ALLREDUCE_ENTRY \
  -DENABLE_NCCL_TRACE_EVENT_ALLREDUCE_EXIT \
  -DENABLE_NCCL_TRACE_EVENT_RING_SEND_ENTRY \
  -DENABLE_NCCL_TRACE_EVENT_RING_SEND_EXIT \
  -DENABLE_NCCL_TRACE_EVENT_PROXY_SEND_ENTRY \
  -DENABLE_NCCL_TRACE_EVENT_PROXY_SEND_EXIT"

# 4. 运行应用
export NCCL_TRACE_DUMP_DIR=/tmp/my_trace
mpirun -np 4 ./my_nccl_app

# 5. 生成可视化
python3 tools/nccl_trace_generator.py \
  --dump_dir /tmp/my_trace \
  --output nccl_trace.json

# 6. 在 Chrome 中打开 chrome://tracing 加载 nccl_trace.json

7.2 环境变量配置

# 追踪输出目录
export NCCL_TRACE_DUMP_DIR=/data/traces/run_001

# 事件过滤 (未来扩展)
export NCCL_TRACE_EVENTS=ALLREDUCE,BROADCAST,RING_*

# 采样率 (降低开销)
export NCCL_TRACE_SAMPLING_RATE=100

# 缓冲区大小 (增加容量)
export NCCL_TRACE_GPU_BUFFER_SIZE=131072  # 128K events

  • [ ] 添加 GPU AllReduce/Broadcast 追踪点

Phase 2: 性能优化

  • [ ] 零拷贝内存优化
  • [ ] 批量事件写入

  • [ ] 性能基准测试

Phase 3: 功能扩展

  • [ ] 支持所有 collective 操作
  • [ ] 添加 P2P/SHM 传输追踪
  • [ ] 实现运行时事件过滤
  • [ ] 开发 Web 可视化界面

Phase 4: 生产就绪

  • [ ] 压缩输出格式
  • [ ] 多节点自动收集
  • [ ] 集成到 CI/CD
  • [ ] 完善文档和示例

九、与现有工具对比

工具优势劣势建议集成方式
NVTX/Nsight深度 CUDA 分析无法看到 NCCL 内部互补使用
NPKit专为 NCCL 设计需要打补丁作为参考实现
Perfetto现代化 UI通用工具支持导出格式
本方案原生集成 NCCL需开发工作主要追踪工具

十、总结与建议

10.1 关键设计原则

  1. 最小侵入性: 使用宏和条件编译，零性能影响（禁用时）
  2. 高效数据结构: 预分配缓冲区，减少运行时开销
  3. 标准化输出: Chrome Trace 格式，生态系统兼容
  4. 易于扩展: 插件式事件定义，简化添加新追踪点

10.2 实施建议

  1. 渐进式开发: 先实现核心功能，再优化性能
  2. 参考 NPKit: 借鉴成熟设计，避免重复造轮子
  3. 自动化测试: 每个追踪点都应有对应测试用例
  4. 文档先行: 清晰的 API 文档和使用示例

10.3 潜在挑战

  1. 时间同步精度: GPU-CPU 时钟漂移需要定期校准
  2. 缓冲区溢出: 长时间运行可能填满缓冲区，需要环形缓冲或动态扩容
  3. 多节点收集: 分布式环境下需要自动化收集和合并追踪数据
  4. 性能开销: 即使优化后也会有 1-5% 的性能影响

十一、参考资料

  1. NPKit 源码: NPKit
  2. MSCCL Profiler: msccl\src\misc\profiler.cc
  3. Google Trace Event Format: https://docs.google.com/document/d/1CvAClvFfyA5R-PhYUmn5OOQtYMH4h6I0nSsKchNAySU
  4. NCCL 源码: https://github.com/NVIDIA/nccl
  5. Chrome Trace Viewer: chrome://tracing
  6. Perfetto UI: https://ui.perfetto.dev
